items.title: Iran threatens to block more trade routes as US launches fresh strikes
items.summary: US President Donald Trump vowed to strike Iran's bridges and power plants next week if the country does not return to talks.

items.title: 4 Different Bobkittens Rescued in a Week, Undergoing Rehab Together for Return to the Wild
items.summary: These two incredible animals are bobkittens, and they’re lucky to be alive. They are 2 of 4 baby bobcats rescued within days of each other, from as many as 3 different mothers—all of whom either died,…
